# Horizon Care Services — Full Reference

## Company Overview

**Name:** Horizon Care Services Ltd
**Company No.:** 14615041
**ICO Registration:** Registered with the Information Commissioner's Office
**Office address:** 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Cheetham Hill, Manchester, M8 9LR
**Phone:** 020 3757 2767 (Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm)
**Email:** contact@horizoncareservices.org
**Website:** https://www.horizoncareservices.org
**Business type:** Healthcare staffing agency — supplying healthcare professionals to organisations across England

Horizon Care Services is a healthcare staffing agency operating across England. We supply trained, qualified and experienced healthcare professionals to NHS trusts, nursing homes, residential care homes, supported living services, and specialist care settings that need staffing cover.

We do not market direct care packages to families or individuals through this website. Our services are aimed at organisations that need staff — for urgent cover, planned rota support, or longer-term placements.

## Services

### Healthcare Staffing
URL: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/

We supply skilled healthcare professionals to NHS trusts, nursing homes, residential care homes, and supported living services at short or extended notice. Roles include:

- Registered Nurses (RGN, RMN, RNLD)
- Senior Healthcare Assistants (Senior HCAs)
- Healthcare Assistants (HCAs)
- Support Workers

Available 24/7, including weekends and bank holidays. We accommodate single-shift requests and long-term contracts. All staff are DBS-checked, verified for their right to work, referenced, and professionally registered where required (NMC).

### Common Staffing Situations We Support

- Urgent sickness cover
- Planned absence
- Recurring rota gaps
- Short-term workforce pressure
- Longer-term placements
- Specialist role requirements
- Weekend and bank holiday cover
- Hard-to-fill rota positions

## Geographic Coverage

We operate in:
- Bedfordshire
- Greater Manchester
- Merseyside
- Lancashire (including Blackpool, Rossendale and surrounding areas)
- Yorkshire

Additional areas may be considered subject to staffing availability and service requirements. Contact us if your location is not listed.

## Our Approach

### Careful Selection
We are selective about the professionals we place. Every candidate is interviewed, reference-checked, and compliance-verified before joining our register.

### Setting-Led Matching
We look at experience, environment, and fit — not just availability. A nursing home, residential care home, and supported living service need different workers.

### Honest About Capacity
We tell commissioning teams what we can and cannot deliver — including timescales and coverage. We do not overcommit.

### Clear Communication
You get clear updates on availability, suitability, and timescales. If we cannot safely meet a requirement, we say so.

## For Commissioning Organisations

We work with NHS trusts, nursing homes, residential care homes, supported living services, and specialist care settings. We respond to enquiries within 2 working hours for urgent requests and within 2 working days for planned requirements.

Contact: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/contact/
Phone: 020 3757 2767 or email contact@horizoncareservices.org

## Careers

We recruit registered nurses, senior healthcare assistants, healthcare assistants, and support workers for flexible agency work across England. We provide structured onboarding, ongoing training, and a named coordinator for every worker on our register.

Work for us: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/

## Contact

- **Phone:** 020 3757 2767 — Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm
- **Email:** contact@horizoncareservices.org — response within 2 working days (same day for urgent cover)
- **Address:** 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Manchester, M8 9LR
